caption: The video depicts a medical consultation taking place on "Day 5" of what appears to be a simulation week, as indicated by the text overlay. Three individuals are seated in a clinical setting, with two wearing blue scrubs and masks, suggesting they are healthcare professionals. The person on the left is writing notes on a clipboard, while the one in the middle holds some papers and listens attentively. The third individual, dressed in casual attire and also wearing a mask, seems to be the patient or participant being interviewed. The environment includes medical equipment and a whiteboard, reinforcing the clinical context. The interaction appears focused and professional, with the healthcare providers actively engaging with the participant.
